title: Ninjago: Legacy Of Spinjitzu
description: A mod that adds the franchise of Lego Ninjago into Minecraft
body:
This is a project that I have been working on for a while, and I will continue to work on this for the foreseeable future. It adds elemental powers, armor, structures and more from the franchise Lego Ninjago.

When you first spawn into a world you will have a 45% chance to gain a natural, hidden elemental power. If you are in that percent you will first need to gain 15 minecraft levels. After gaining these levels, you will then awaken your hidden elemental power. The elemental power that you can gain is randomly chosen from one of the elemental powers below. 

If you are in the 55% that do not spawn in with an elemental power, there is still a semihard way to gain one. In order to gain a non-natural elemental power, you will first need to complete the task of gathering all 4 golden weapons from their respective structures. After obtaining all of the golden weapons, you will then use them in a crafting table to craft the megaweapon. The megaweapon has the ability to create any item that you want, or the ability to give yourself a random elemental power from the list below.

Obtainable Elements (As of version 0.1.0):
Fire
Earth
Ice
Lightning
Energy
Creation
Destruction

In this mod there is also customizable gis, the uniforms that the ninja wear. If you want to wear a coloured gi and also have a gi accessory, you will need to install another mod. Curios (For Forge) or Trinkets (For Fabric). After installing one of these mods, you can now put one of the accessories into their respective slot.

And of course, one of the coolest aspects of ninjago is in this mod, Spinjitzu and Airjitzu. These martial arts can be learnt by reading 3 books of the respective jitzu, and you can obtain these books from temples you will find around the world, along with other goods and treasures.

There is a lot more to this mod, but I would rather you try this mod for yourself and figure it all out by yourself. Have fun and enjoy!

Also be sure to check out my youtube channel, it showcases some things as I was developing them and I will post more videos showing my progress in the near future.
